description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a right-hand chaise, upholstered in a dark gray fabric with contrasting light beige accents along the base and armrests. The sofa features three backrest cushions and three seat cushions on the main section, with an extended chaise lounge forming the L-shape. The backrest and seat cushions are tufted, giving a subtle, plush appearance. The armrests are broad and padded, with a straight, boxy profile and a slight outward flare at the front. The legs are short and minimally visible, suggesting a low-profile design. The overall look is contemporary and comfortable, suitable for urban living rooms, lounges, or waiting areas.
description: A contemporary L-shaped sectional sofa in dark gray with light beige accents, featuring tufted cushions and broad, padded armrests. The design is modern and plush, ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, tufted back and seat cushions, and both armrests with beige accents.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the straight padded armrest, and the low-profile leg design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the subtle beige trim on the armrest and base.
description_view_3: Side view from the chaise end, showing the extended lounge section and the uniform cushion arrangement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual backrest cushions and three seat cushions on the main section, with an extended single cushion on the chaise; all cushions are attached and uniformly sized, featuring subtle tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Both armrests are present, broad, and padded with a straight, boxy profile and a slight outward flare at the front; the armrests are slightly lower than the backrest and feature a contrasting light beige accent.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are short, block-style, and minimally visible, likely positioned at the corners and possibly recessed; no distinctive finish or texture is apparent.
attribute_backrest_type: The backrest is medium-height, straight, and segmented into three attached, tufted cushions, providing a continuous and supportive structure.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid dark gray with a smooth, matte finish and subtle tufting on the cushions; no visible decorative stitching or patterned fabric.
